title: PhosphoTyrosine Western Blotting

steps: Run 80% of IP eluate on 10% Tris-Glycine gel Anti-Phosphoserine Antibody Merck Millipore (EMD Millipore) Catalog #AB1603
Transfer protein to PVDF membrane for 1hr at RT with ice pack (100V)
Cut membrane just below 180kD (top MW marker on benchmark prestained ladder) Bovine Serum Albumin (IgG-Free, Protease-Free) Jackson ImmunoResearch Laboratories, Inc. Catalog #001-000-161

Cut Membrane at ~82kD (the blue band above the pink band using benchmark prestained ladder). **Note, the GST-tagged protein is ~115 kD. Cutting the membrane in the places will help reduce non-specific binding. Also, running a ladder in the middle of the gel will help you cut straight across the membrane in the event that the gel is transferred at an angle relative to the membrane. Bovine Serum Albumin (IgG-Free, Protease-Free) Jackson ImmunoResearch Laboratories, Inc. Catalog #001-000-161
Block membrane with 5% BSA (IgG and Protease-Free)/TBST for 2hrs at RT Bovine Serum Albumin (IgG-Free, Protease-Free) Jackson ImmunoResearch Laboratories, Inc. Catalog #001-000-161

Probe membrane with rabbit-anti-tyrosine antibody from millipore in IgG-Free/Protease-Free BSA/TBST (1:1000). Probe overnight at 4C in cold room on tilting tray. Phospho-Tyrosine (P-Tyr-1000) MultiMab™ Rabbit mAb mix Contributed by users Catalog #8954
Rinse membrane 8x over the course of 2hrs with 1x TBST
Block membrane in 5% milk/TBST for 1hr
Probe with mouse-anti-rabbit light-chain specific secondary antibody at 1:2000 for 2hrs at RT Mouse Anti-Rabbit light chain, HRP conjugate Antibody Contributed by users Catalog #MAB201P
Rinse 6x with TBST over 1hr at RT
Activate membrane with pico ECL SuperSignal™ West Pico Chemiluminescent Substrate (Pico) Contributed by users Catalog #34080
Visualize with Amersham film Amersham Hyperfilm MP GE Healthcare Catalog #28-9068-46
Strip with Restore Stripping buffer (10minutes at RT) Restore™ Western Blot Stripping Buffer Contributed by users Catalog #21059
Rinse 1x with TBST
Block with 5% milk/TBST for 30 minutes
Probe with rabbit-anti-GST (1:2,000) overnight at 4C in cold room in 5% milk. GST (91G1) Rabbit mAb Contributed by users Catalog #2625
Rinse 5x with TBST over 1hr
Probe with anti-rabbit at 1:2,000 in 5% milk/TBST for 1hr at RT Anti-rabbit IgG, HRP-linked Antibody Contributed by users Catalog #7074
Rinse 5x over 1hr with 1x TBST at RT
Activate membrane with Pico ECL SuperSignal™ West Pico Chemiluminescent Substrate (Pico) Contributed by users Catalog #34080
Visuaize with Amersham Hyperfilm Amersham Hyperfilm MP GE Healthcare Catalog #28-9068-46
creator: Christopher Bartley
